title: Doors Tablet DataPack
description: This DataPack Adds A Item From Roblox Doors
body:
- Look In The Gallery for the item recipe

This DataPack Adds A Item From Roblox Doors: https://www.roblox.com/games/6516141723/DOORS
- To Use The Tablet Just Hold Right-Click With It In Your Mainhand Or Offhand.

- This Item Can Find Items, Also Item Frames And Armor Stands If There Items On Them. If You Use The Tablet To Find Things Armor Stands And Items, And Item Frames Will Glow.

Functions: doors_tablet:give
